default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's SoW to clarify scope and deliverables for a final vendor evaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The SoW covers editorial content only** (5 articles/week), not technical SEO or backlinking. This is a key gap compared to Boulevard's other finalist vendor.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [**A 2-phase model starts with an 8-week Strategy Sprint** to build a content roadmap and publish initial articles, followed by ongoing Growth Execution.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**The core deliverable is 5 articles/week** (new or refreshed), with programmatic content as a potential, no-cost pivot once editorial opportunities are exhausted.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
  - [**Boulevard will redline the SoW** to propose adding specific services, such as technical SEO analysis, to align the scope with their needs.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Topics

### Boulevard's Evaluation Context

  - [Boulevard is in the final stage of evaluating two firms for content services, with a decision expected in \~1 week.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [This call focused on the commercial and scope details of GrowthX's Statement of Work (SoW).](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### GrowthX's Service Model

  - [GrowthX's model is a standardized, two-phase process:](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [**Phase 1: 8-Week Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
          - [**Goal:** Develop a 3–6 month content roadmap and publish initial articles.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
          - [**Process:** Kickoff calls → resource gathering → SEO/competitor audits → keyword analysis → topic cluster development.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
          - [**Deliverables:** A detailed strategy and content plan in a shared Notion/Airtable workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution**](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
          - [**Goal:** Publish 5 articles/week (new or refreshed) based on the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
          - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
              - [5 published-ready articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
              - [Performance tracking via a Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
              - [AI search performance reporting (e.g., prompt tracking).](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
              - [Weekly/bi-weekly syncs and monthly reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

### Scope & Deliverables Clarification

  - [**Content Creation:** The 5 articles/week include the full process: research, brief creation, drafting, and final publication.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [**AI Role:** AI generates initial drafts, but the process is heavily human-driven, with manual keyword analysis, brief creation, and final review to ensure quality and brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [**Programmatic Content:** This is a potential pivot, not an add-on. If editorial opportunities are exhausted, the engagement can shift to building a programmatic content engine (e.g., calculators, location pages) at no additional cost.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
  - [**Out of Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [Active backlinking campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
      - [Technical SEO implementation (the Strategy Sprint includes an audit report, but not the execution of its recommendations).](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

### Account Team Structure

  - [The core team has three points of contact:](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Engagement Manager:** Day-to-day contact and strategy lead.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Managing Editor:** End-to-end content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Managing Director:** Pooled resource for high-level strategy and performance intervention.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [The editor from the Strategy Sprint continues through Growth Execution to ensure continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Boulevard (Brian):**](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [Redline the SoW to propose adding specific services, such as technical SEO analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [Discuss a potential CEO-to-CEO call between Matt (Boulevard) and Marcel (GrowthX).](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [Share the redlined SoW with GrowthX for review.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Tyler):**](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2283.0)
      - [Await the redlined SoW and any follow-up questions from the Boulevard team.](https://fathom.video/share/yf5MSQPDsQyTYdVDR_1_jGgNksZS1c5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)

action_items.description: Review GrowthX SoW; send redlines/questions to Tyler; include refresh language + backlink analysis if needed
Email Matt re: CEO-to-CEO call w/ Marcel
